reference_answer: Gate coordinator Jae Park held custody of the north gate key.
Secretary Ona Bell filed official key register KR-6.
SN-6 recommended lending the key to plot captains during harvest week.
DR-6 remained draft pending a council vote.
Garden access rule GA-2 governed gate keys.
The council vote allowed temporary checkout only to plot captains and kept custody with Jae Park.
CO-6 required emergency access for fire inspection but did not authorize member checkout.
SP-6 was noncontrolling because it copied DR-6 and omitted the council vote and CF-6.
